table-348-348.caption: Find all cards illustrated by Stephen Daniel and describe the text of the ruling of these cards. State if these cards have missing or degraded properties and values.
data: When Mystic Orb enters the battlefield, scry 2.
Ancient Guardian cannot be targeted by spells or abilities.
If Shadow Lurker would be destroyed, instead return it to its owner's hand.
Tap: Add one mana of any color. This ability can only be activated once per turn.
When Vengeful Spirit dies, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.
Enchant creature. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has reach.
Dragon's Breath deals 3 damage to any target.
